---
title: "Reshape Climate Normals"
---

### Packages

```{r}
#| label: pkg
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(tidyverse)
  library(arrow)
  library(gt)
})
```

### Climatological Reference Period 

```{r}
#| label: crp
crp_beg <- 1961
crp_end <- 1990
```

### Recent Climate Period

```{r}
# label: rcp
rcp_beg <- 2011
rcp_end <- 2020
```

### Paths

```{r}
#| label: pth
dir_rd <- "_data/02-climate-normals/"
dir_wr <- "_data/03-data-reshaping/"
```

### Dictionaries

```{r}
#| label: dct
dct_ndy <- data.frame(
    mth = 1:12,
    ndy = as.integer(c(31, 28, 31, 30, 31, 30, 31, 31, 30, 31, 30, 31))
  )
```

### Functions

```{r}
#| label: fn
#| warning: false
fn_reshape_data <- function(crp, cv, dir_rd, dir_wr) {

  fil <- paste0(crp, "_", cv, "_normals.parquet")
  pth <- paste0(dir_rd, fil)
  df <- read_parquet(pth) 

  df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    lon = as.numeric(lon),
    lat = as.numeric(lat),
    lon = if_else(lon > 180, lon - 360, lon)
  )

  if (cv == "t") {
    df <- df |> 
      mutate(t = t2m - 273.15) |>
      select(lon,lat,mth,t)
  } else {
    df <- df |> 
      left_join(dct_ndy, by = "mth") |> 
      mutate(p = tp * ndy * 1000) |>
      select(lon,lat,mth,p)
  }

  pivot_df <- df |>
    pivot_wider(
      names_from = c(mth),
      values_from = c(cv),
      names_prefix = "m",
      names_sep = "" # no underscore in new col names
    )
  fil <- paste0(crp, "_", cv, "_wide.parquet")
  pth = paste0(dir_wr, fil)
  write_parquet(pivot_df, pth)
}
```

### Pivot data

```{r}
#| label: pvt
#| warning: false
fn_reshape_data("crp", "t", dir_rd, dir_wr)
fn_reshape_data("crp", "p", dir_rd, dir_wr)
fn_reshape_data("rcp", "t", dir_rd, dir_wr)
fn_reshape_data("rcp", "p", dir_rd, dir_wr)
```

### Summarize Results

```{r}
#| label: gt1_files

fil <- "crp_t_wide.parquet"
pth = paste0(dir_wr, fil)
df1 <- read_parquet(pth) 

fil <- "crp_p_wide.parquet"
pth = paste0(dir_wr, fil)
df2 <- read_parquet(pth) 

fil <- "rcp_t_wide.parquet"
pth = paste0(dir_wr, fil)
df3 <- read_parquet(pth) 

fil <- "rcp_p_wide.parquet"
pth = paste0(dir_wr, fil)
df4 <- read_parquet(pth) 
```


```{r}
#| label: gt1_build

# --- function to summarize data frame into long form ---
summarize_long <- function(df, name) {
  df %>%
    summarise(across(
      everything(),
      list(
        min  = ~min(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
        max  = ~max(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
        mean = ~mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE)
      ),
      .names = "{.col}.{.fn}"
    )) %>%
    pivot_longer(
      everything(),
      names_to = c("variable", "stat"),
      names_sep = "\\.",
      values_to = "value"
    ) %>%
    mutate(dataset = name)
}

# --- input frames as a named list ---
dfs <- list(df1 = df1, df2 = df2, df3 = df3, df4 = df4)

# --- build combined long summary for all 4 datasets ---
summary_long <- imap(dfs, ~summarize_long(.x, .y)) %>% bind_rows()

# order variables: lat, lon, m1..m12
var_order <- c("lat", "lon", paste0("m", 1:12))

# --- pivot to wide: columns = dataset_stat (e.g., df1_min) ---
wide <- summary_long %>%
  mutate(variable = factor(variable, levels = var_order)) %>%
  arrange(variable, dataset, stat) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    id_cols = variable,
    names_from = c(dataset, stat),
    values_from = value,
    names_sep = "_"
  )

# ensure a clean column order
col_order <- c(
  "variable",
  unlist(lapply(names(dfs), function(d) paste0(d, c("_min", "_max", "_mean"))))
)
wide <- wide %>% select(any_of(col_order))

# map column names to pretty labels
label_map <- setNames(rep(c("Min", "Max", "Mean"), length(dfs)), col_order[-1])

# --- build gt table with nested spanners ---
gt_tbl <-
  wide %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = "Summary of Climate Variables",
    #subtitle = "Min / Max / Mean for Climatology vs Recent Climate Period"
  ) %>%
  cols_label(!!!label_map, variable = "Variable") %>%
  # dataset-level spanners with custom labels
  tab_spanner(label = "CRP Temperature (°C)", columns = c(df1_min, df1_max, df1_mean)) %>%
  tab_spanner(label = "CRP Precipitation (mm)", columns = c(df2_min, df2_max, df2_mean)) %>%
  tab_spanner(label = "RCP Temperature (°C)", columns = c(df3_min, df3_max, df3_mean)) %>%
  tab_spanner(label = "RCP Precipitation (mm)", columns = c(df4_min, df4_max, df4_mean)) %>%
  # higher-level spanners
  tab_spanner(
    label = "Climatological Reference Period 1961-1990",
    columns = c(df1_min, df1_max, df1_mean,
                df2_min, df2_max, df2_mean)
  ) %>%
  tab_spanner(
    label = "Recent Climate Period 2011-2020",
    columns = c(df3_min, df3_max, df3_mean,
                df4_min, df4_max, df4_mean)
  ) %>%
  fmt_number(
    columns = setdiff(colnames(wide), "variable"),
    decimals = 2
  )

gt_tbl
```
